sections.paragraph:
Original: עקב

Transliteration: ‛êqeb

Phonetic: ay'-keb

BDB Definition:

  1. consequence (noun masculine)
    1. consequence
    2. consequence, gain, reward
    3. end
  2. as a consequence, because, consequently (adverb)
  3. as a consequence of, that, because (conjunction)

Origin: from H6117 in the sense of H6119

TWOT entry: 1676e

Part(s) of speech:
